Everything happens inside SOLIDWORKS. You don t need to create something and move it into a different tool. You have everything inside. I think that s the main feature that makes SOLIDWORKS Simulation easier for the user.Marcus SobralTenaris Powerful Simulation for All   Expand Horizons Simulation is the best tool to make smart design decisions and ensure you re bringing high-quality products to market faster. Watch the video
